lesson.menu_title: My Day, My Routine -- Talking About Daily Life in São Paulo and at Work
lesson.menu_desc: Reading + present simple, frequency adverbs and times of day -- 29 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 6 -- My Day, My Routine -- Daily Life in São Paulo and at Work
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Maísa de Oliveira Santos | Aula 6 -- My Day, My Routine

paras: Maísa lives in São Paulo. She has a busy routine. She always wakes up at 6 o'clock in the morning. First, she has a coffee and reads the news at home.
She gets to work at 8 o'clock. In the morning, she usually has meetings with her team. She often works on reports and numbers. At noon, she has lunch with a colleague near the office.
After lunch, she sometimes takes a short break for a walk. In the afternoon, she talks to clients on the phone. She never leaves the office before 6 o'clock.
At night, she goes home, has dinner, and watches TV. She usually goes to bed at 11. On weekends, Maísa does not work. She relaxes and sees her family.

reading.prompt: What is the best one-line summary of this text?
choices: Maísa never works and relaxes at home all day.
Maísa has a busy daily routine in São Paulo, with a fixed schedule from morning to night.
Maísa works at night and sleeps in the morning.

listenings.text: Hi, this is David. Let me tell you about my day. I usually wake up at seven o'clock in the morning. I always have a big breakfast with coffee. Then I get to work at nine. In the morning, I often answer emails and calls. At one o'clock, I have lunch with my team. In the afternoon, I sometimes take a short break for coffee. I never work late at night. I go home at six, and I usually watch football on TV. What is your routine like?

Good morning. This is Sarah. My routine is very busy. I wake up early, at five thirty in the morning. I always go to the gym before work. Then I get to work at eight o'clock. I usually have three meetings in the morning. At noon, I have lunch, but I never take a long break. In the afternoon, I often call clients. At night, I go home and cook dinner. On weekends, I sometimes travel with my family. I love my routine!

extra_audio.text: Good morning. I wake up at six o'clock. Then I get to work at eight. At noon, I have lunch with a colleague. At night, I go home and relax.
